x-enumeration-literals.name: Spot
x-enumeration-literals.description: Exchange rate applied is the spot rate. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Sale
x-enumeration-literals.description: Exchange rate applied is the market rate at the time of the sale (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Agreed
x-enumeration-literals.description: Exchange rate applied is the rate agreed between the parties. (ISO20022)
